rationale: The response recognizes the repeated pattern of downstream manual gates, treats the new confirmer only as a temporary emergency stopgap, blocks it from becoming routine, sets an expiry/no-more-gates rule, and moves upstream to recurring structural causes such as capacity, handoff rhythm, responsibility boundaries, reminders, and ledger design. It is not a pure refusal because it permits today's confirmer, but it still fires the brake and prevents the N+1 repair from becoming the default.
